page_text: Official University of Edinburgh funding page for 2026/27. The Home Student Award is restricted to applicants assessed as UK home fee status. International fee-paying applicants are not eligible.

rules.evidence_text: Official page states the award is for 2026/27.

rules.requirement_text: Only UK home applicants are eligible.
rules.evidence_text: Official page restricts the award to applicants assessed as UK home fee status.

rules.requirement_text: Applicant must have UK home fee status.
rules.evidence_text: Official page says international fee-paying applicants are not eligible.
